codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly wires VAL-DSH-022 by threading an `onOpenPolicyPrompt` callback from `DashboardScreen` -> `RunningState` -> `PendingApprovalsPanel` and binding it to the first Pending Approvals row. It also adds focused fidelity tests for VAL-DSH-014..018, VAL-DSH-022, and VAL-DSH-023, including modal dismissal behavior for Signing Failed. No blocking regressions were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature artifact drift exists inside features.json for this feature: its `expectedBehavior` still describes outdated Export modal content (masked bfprofile preview in Export Profile, 'Exported' + QR button in Export Complete), while the feature description and validation contract require the newer Paper-aligned content.

Another requirement drift: feature description says every dashboard modal has a top-right close affordance, but the Paper reference for Export Complete does not show one; implementation follows Paper and contract by using a Done-only close path.

summary: Pass. Diff implements the missing Pending Approvals -> Policy Prompt wiring and adds high-signal fidelity coverage for all assigned VAL IDs without introducing regressions. Shared-state notes recorded for feature/contract wording drift.
